app_description: Professional novel translation plugin with webpage, reader mode and selection translation
reader_mode_desc: Extract article text for a cleaner reading experience
auto_translate_desc: Automatically translate when text is selected
show_translit_desc: Include transliteration in translation results (if available)
export_placeholder: Click export to see JSON here...
import_warning: Importing will overwrite current settings. Proceed with caution.
input_json: Please enter or paste valid JSON
confirm_reset: Are you sure you want to restore default settings?
cannot_communicate:
Cannot communicate with the current page. Please ensure the page has fully loaded, then try again.

Note: Internal browser pages (such as chrome://, about:) and extension pages are not supported.
communicate_retry: Cannot communicate with the current page. Please refresh and try again:
step1_desc: Click "Go to Login" below, or open the extension popup from the browser toolbar
step2_desc: Register with your email, then verify with the code sent to your inbox
step3_desc: Once logged in, you can use webpage translation, reader mode, and expert mode
expert_notice_text: Expert mode uses large language models for translation, resulting in higher quality but slower speed. To ensure service quality, this feature is only available to logged-in users. Free users can still enjoy basic translation.
feat_webpage_desc: Translate an entire page with one click
